name: sbox-claude
description: Build s&box games by talking to Claude. Bundles the Claude Bridge MCP server (~166 tools, incl. networking/scene inspection & lint, save & services queries), a screenshot-driven game-dev workflow skill (sbox-build-feature), a schema-grounded s&box API skill (sbox-api: Unity→s&box translation + components/UI/networking/physics references, adapted from claude-sbox), the sbox-cookbook recipe router (code-grounded recipes from 27 open-source s&box games — 11 engine + 15 system + 14 genre references), a sbox-scaffold-game starter, and an optional sbox-game-dev specialist agent. The s&box editor addon must be installed separately (see README).
